name: Cid Kagenou — I Am Atomic
description:
Cid Kagenou, or as the world knows him — Shadow, the enigmatic leader of Shadow Garden who operates from the deepest shadows. Beneath the unassuming exterior of a background character lies the most powerful being in the realm, a master of magic who has achieved the impossible: complete control over atomic-level mana manipulation.

This piece captures the moment Cid reveals his true power. Violet mana swirls around him like a galaxy given form as he raises his hand — the signature pose before uttering those three world-ending words. His slime bodysuit shimmers with latent energy, and behind those calm eyes burns the passion of a man who dedicated his entire life to becoming the Eminence in Shadow, not for power or fame, but because it's just that cool.
